starter.valueUnlock: Open-source and local runs stay completely free. Upgrade anytime for CI features.

individual.audience: Solo engineers running verification in CI
individual.valueUnlock: Run verification in CI and automatically fail builds on mismatch, with included monthly quota.

team.valueUnlock: Enforcement and quota for shared pipelines without constantly hitting the ceiling.

business.valueUnlock: More monthly verifications when you run checks across several services or busy pipelines.

enterprise.audience: Procurement, custom limits, on-prem, or locked-down environments
enterprise.valueUnlock: Sales-led onboarding with tailored contract terms.
